message-param.param-value: /base/message/messageItemList.jsp

insert into JF_ERR_MSG_MNG (MSG_CODE, MSG_TYPE, TARGET_DOMAIN, MANAGER_ID, MSG_CUSTOMER, MSG_MANAGER, MSG_DESC, CREATOR, CREATE_DATE, MODIFIER, MODIFIED_DATE, MSG_SEND, TEMPLATE_NAME, TEMPLATE_URL, MANAGER_EMAIL) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), ?, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), ?, ?, ?, ?)
delete from JF_ERR_MSG_MNG where MSG_CODE = ?
DB

select MSG_CODE key, MSG_CODE, MSG_TYPE, TARGET_DOMAIN, MANAGER_ID, MSG_CUSTOMER, MSG_MANAGER, MSG_DESC, CREATOR, CREATE_DATE, MODIFIER, MODIFIED_DATE, MSG_SEND, TEMPLATE_NAME, TEMPLATE_URL, MANAGER_EMAIL from JF_ERR_MSG_MNG where TARGET_DOMAIN = ?

update JF_ERR_MSG_MNG set MSG_TYPE = ?, TARGET_DOMAIN = ?, MANAGER_ID = ?, MSG_CUSTOMER = ?, MSG_MANAGER = ?, MSG_DESC = ?, MODIFIER = ?, MODIFIED_DATE = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), MSG_SEND = ?, TEMPLATE_NAME = ?, TEMPLATE_URL = ?, MANAGER_EMAIL = ? where MSG_CODE = ?

select MSG_CODE key, MSG_CODE, MSG_TYPE, TARGET_DOMAIN, MANAGER_ID, MSG_CUSTOMER, MSG_MANAGER, MSG_DESC, CREATOR, CREATE_DATE, MODIFIER, MODIFIED_DATE, MSG_SEND, TEMPLATE_NAME, TEMPLATE_URL, MANAGER_EMAIL from JF_ERR_MSG_MNG

select MSG_CODE key, MSG_CODE, MSG_TYPE, TARGET_DOMAIN, MANAGER_ID, MSG_CUSTOMER, MSG_MANAGER, MSG_DESC, CREATOR, CREATE_DATE, MODIFIER, MODIFIED_DATE, MSG_SEND, TEMPLATE_NAME, TEMPLATE_URL, MANAGER_EMAIL from (select MSG_CODE key, MSG_CODE, MSG_TYPE, TARGET_DOMAIN, MANAGER_ID, MSG_CUSTOMER, MSG_MANAGER, MSG_DESC, CREATOR, CREATE_DATE, MODIFIER, MODIFIED_DATE, MSG_SEND, TEMPLATE_NAME, TEMPLATE_URL, MANAGER_EMAIL, CEIL(rownum/?) page from (select MSG_CODE key, MSG_CODE, MSG_TYPE, TARGET_DOMAIN, MANAGER_ID, MSG_CUSTOMER, MSG_MANAGER, MSG_DESC, CREATOR, CREATE_DATE, MODIFIER, MODIFIED_DATE, MSG_SEND, TEMPLATE_NAME, TEMPLATE_URL, MANAGER_EMAIL from JF_ERR_MSG_MNG where MSG_CODE like '%'||?||'%' and MSG_CONTENT and sDomainIDs order by CREATE_DATE desc )) where page=?
jSpeedDataSource
select count(*) from JF_ERR_MSG_MNG where MSG_CODE like '%'||?||'%' and MSG_CONTENT and sDomainIDs

select MSG_CODE key, MSG_CODE, MSG_TYPE, TARGET_DOMAIN, MANAGER_ID, MSG_CUSTOMER, MSG_MANAGER, MSG_DESC, CREATOR, CREATE_DATE, MODIFIER, MODIFIED_DATE, MSG_SEND, TEMPLATE_NAME, TEMPLATE_URL, MANAGER_EMAIL from JF_ERR_MSG_MNG where MSG_CODE = ?

message-service-config.name: jspeed.err.msg.tplt.mng

message-param.param-value: select TEMPLATE_NAME||'.'||TARGET_DOMAIN, TEMPLATE_NAME, TARGET_DOMAIN, TEMPLATE_TYPE, TEMPLATE_URL, CREATOR, CREATE_DATE, MODIFIER, MODIFIED_DATE, TEMPLATE_DESC from JF_ERR_MSG_TPLT_MNG
DB
/base/message/messageTemplateList.jsp

insert into JF_ERR_MSG_TPLT_MNG (TEMPLATE_NAME, TARGET_DOMAIN, TEMPLATE_TYPE, TEMPLATE_URL, CREATOR, CREATE_DATE, MODIFIER, MODIFIED_DATE, TEMPLATE_DESC) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), ?, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), ?)
update JF_ERR_MSG_TPLT_MNG set TEMPLATE_URL = ?, MODIFIER = ?, MODIFIED_DATE= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), TEMPLATE_DESC = ? where TEMPLATE_NAME = ? and TARGET_DOMAIN = ?

select TEMPLATE_NAME||'.'||TARGET_DOMAIN, TEMPLATE_NAME, TARGET_DOMAIN, TEMPLATE_TYPE, TEMPLATE_URL, CREATOR, CREATE_DATE, MODIFIER, MODIFIED_DATE, TEMPLATE_DESC from JF_ERR_MSG_TPLT_MNG where TEMPLATE_NAME=? and TARGET_DOMAIN = ?
jSpeedDataSource
delete from JF_ERR_MSG_TPLT_MNG where TEMPLATE_NAME = ? and TARGET_DOMAIN = ?

select TEMPLATE_NAME||'.'||TARGET_DOMAIN, TEMPLATE_NAME, TARGET_DOMAIN, TEMPLATE_TYPE, TEMPLATE_URL, CREATOR, CREATE_DATE, MODIFIER, MODIFIED_DATE, TEMPLATE_DESC from JF_ERR_MSG_TPLT_MNG where TARGET_DOMAIN = ?
select TEMPLATE_NAME||'.'||TARGET_DOMAIN, TEMPLATE_NAME, TARGET_DOMAIN, TEMPLATE_TYPE, TEMPLATE_URL, CREATOR, CREATE_DATE, MODIFIER, MODIFIED_DATE, TEMPLATE_DESC from JF_ERR_MSG_TPLT_MNG

message-service-config.description: JSPEED ERR MSG TPLT MNG properties
